textByHash.5230a7df5e526fa5c1ace53c619d7fde2066cda6: Hello! What can I do for you?
textByHash.98b99cd1095d0a967781c81d387a5b62be5ef18c: This is the port of Land's End!
textByHash.70223d40e339dead888f0fa60478db27edfa7651: Certainly. We're on the southern edge of the Kingdom of Great Kourend.
textByHash.5b9248967ebcd1cdf6fbb686a53981b5b17c6ea8: The kingdom is made up of five main cities. You'll find Shayzien and Lovakengj to the north, and the remaining cities to the north east.
textByHash.7033b2b6053aea62c82608746575399f9fbd66c4: As you wish, I hope you don't get seasick, it is a long voyage.
